steps.title: Find the shared observation across both texts
steps.content: Text 1 states that “many of today's artists are making albums that are much longer than albums from decades past.” Text 2 echoes this, noting that “many new albums are longer and have more songs than albums crafted for physical formats.” Both authors directly address the same phenomenon: a shift toward longer albums.

steps.title: Match the observation to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice C states that new albums are longer than they once were—exactly what both texts confirm through their explanations of how digital streaming and the removal of physical constraints have enabled longer releases. The other choices describe phenomena not addressed in either text. That matches choice C — C is correct.
